event: Set design for The Merchant of Venice - waterfront scene
description: A theatrical set design depicting a Venetian waterfront viewed through large Gothic arches and columns in the foreground. Several small figures are scattered through the scene — some seated, others standing or walking. Beyond the arches, ornate buildings with balconies and windows line a canal or piazza. The composition is architectural and spacious, rendered in watercolor with muted tones of blue, gray, and warm stone colors. The perspective draws the eye through the dark foreground arcade into the sunlit spaces beyond.

_meta.title: On the waterfront. Set Design for Shakespeare's drama "The Merchant of Venice"
